channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Building a DPI-Resistant VPN with VLESS REALITY & Nginx (Open Source)
item.description: tags: opensource, security, python, bash If you live in a region with strict internet censorship (like China, Iran, or Russia), you probably know that the golden age of traditional VPNs is over....

item.title: Building Connect Freelance — A Trust-Focused Freelance Platform
item.description: Most freelance platforms optimize for activity, not hiring quality. More proposals. More clicks. More notifications. But not necessarily better hiring. That creates a broken experience for both...

item.title: Stop reimplementing file uploads for your Python ASGI app. Meet tussi.
item.description: Stop reimplementing file uploads for your Python ASGI app. Meet tussi. Every few months I find myself in the same situation: "we need to support large file uploads". And every time, it's a chore....

item.title: If You Can Survive a Toddler, You Can Ship LLMs in Production
item.description: A few years back I was running a time-series pipeline that scored incoming product reviews on a 1-10 scale. The scorer was an LLM. Reviews rolled in continuously, ratings flowed into a dashboard...

item.description: I read a lot of research papers. And like most people, I found myself constantly: Googling terminology mid-read Losing track of what each section was arguing Forgetting what I'd understood by the...

item.title: Stop Storing JWTs in localStorage: A Security Guide for Web Developers

item.title: Subnautica 2 is having a huge launch on Steam
item.description: Subnautica 2, the new underwater survival game from Unknown Worlds, took less than an hour to rocket up Steam's charts. The game has already sold more than one million copies, according to a press...

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI

item.title: Netflix is building an AI animation studio

item.title: Americans do not want AI data centers in their backyards
item.description: Over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their area, according to a new Gallup survey. Just 7 percent said they were "strongly" in favor of new data centers. According to...

item.title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
item.description: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

item.title: The Beats Solo 4 have returned to their best price of the year
item.description: If you want a pair of Apple-made wireless headphones that work just as well with Android as with iOS, the Beats Solo 4 are down to around $129.95 ($70 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target. That...

item.title: Razer’s Blade 18 is getting a $500 price hike and a new Intel chip
item.description: Razer just announced a new Blade 18 gaming laptop with an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus chip. The flagship laptop is available now on Razer's site, starting at $3,999.99 with an Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti...

item.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
item.description: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

item.title: Ghostwriter Targets Ukrainian Government With Geofenced PDF Phishing, Cobalt Strike
item.description: The Belarus-aligned threat group known as Ghostwriter has been attributed to a fresh set of attacks targeting governmental organizations in Ukraine. Active since at least 2016, Ghostwriter has...

item.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
item.description: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

item.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multimodal data to AI labs
item.description: Wirestock has over 700,000 creators on its platform, which supplies photos, videos and 3D content to AI labs.

item.title: Data readiness for agentic AI in financial services

item.title: Establishing AI and data sovereignty in the age of autonomous systems
